description: Added direct comparison-hub links from the Apple Health + Claude and Apple Health + Gemini local API pages to /ai-health-analysis/.
expected_impact: Strengthens the AI health analysis topic cluster for Claude/Gemini health workflow queries and gives crawlers a clearer path from assistant-specific pages to the comparison hub.

description: Added author meta plus Article and VideoObject JSON-LD to the Apple Health + Claude page for E-E-A-T freshness and video rich-result eligibility.
expected_impact: Improves AI extractability for Claude Apple Health queries, exposes dateModified/author signals, and makes the internal workflow MP4 eligible for video understanding by crawlers.

description: Added Article and VideoObject JSON-LD to the Apple Health + Gemini page for E-E-A-T freshness and Google video rich-result eligibility.
expected_impact: Improves AI extractability and rich-result eligibility for Gemini Apple Health queries; carries dateModified and describes the internal workflow MP4 for crawlers.

description: Added an internal comparison-hub link from the Apple Health + OpenAI page to /ai-health-analysis/ to strengthen the AI health analysis topic cluster.
expected_impact: Helps ChatGPT/OpenAI-focused visitors and crawlers discover the AI health comparison hub; improves internal PageRank flow to the new hub while keeping the change low-risk.
